---
---

# Mana Hariri

Applied Mathematics & Statistics student at UCLA interested in 
data science, statistical modeling, and machine learning.

---

## Explore the Site

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-4}
### About
Education, academic background, and interests.

[Learn More →](about.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
### Projects
Data science and statistical modeling projects from my coursework.

[View Projects →](projects.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
### Experience
Professional work, and leadership roles.

[See Experience →](experience.qmd)
:::

:::

---

## Skills

**Languages:** R, Python  
**Tools:** Git, Quarto, LaTeX  
**Focus:** Data Science, Machine Learning, Statistical Modeling
